creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
Best I can tell, this issue is known (not usb specific) and already
fixed. Unfortunately 7.0-RELEASE is having this boot loader problem.
Please try either updating your system to a recent 7-STABLE system and
reinstall boot0 code or (in case of a 7.x CD boot) fetch the 7-STABLE
snapshot iso created 2007-03.

Volker
